notes: key = filename without extension — use directly as this.load.image(key, path)
character[] uses PNG/Poses/ at 96x128. Each entry has hdPath/hdWidth/hdHeight for 192x256 HD version at PNG/Poses HD/.
Tilesheet files are now indexed in spritesheets[] — use this.load.spritesheet() with frameWidth/frameHeight from that section.
PNG/Parts/ and PNG/Parts HD/ excluded — rig-based body parts, not for Phaser frame animation
All tile and most enemy dimensions confirmed 64x64. Exceptions: bat variants, frog variants, ghost, spider variants.

spritesheets.notes: Load with this.load.spritesheet(key, path, { frameWidth: 96, frameHeight: 128 }). Frame indices are 0-based, left-to-right, top-to-bottom. An XML atlas (character_femaleAdventurer_sheet.xml) exists alongside the PNG if you prefer atlas loading.

backgrounds.notes: Solid fill tile — repeatable for parallax layers
Solid fill tile — repeatable for parallax layers
Solid fill tile — repeatable for parallax layers
Solid fill tile — repeatable for parallax layers
Solid fill tile — repeatable for parallax layers

character.notes: Isolated head sprite for HUD icon use

companion.notes: Damage flash frame — use for invincibility flicker
Walk cycle frame B — alternate with walk_a every ~133ms

tiles.notes: Primary collectible — recommended for score pickups
Source filename typo (missing e in "rope") — Kenney pack as-shipped
